variants.title: Filtrec RHK201M10B Return Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec RHK201M10B. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the RHK201M10B provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Media: Synthetic, Efficiency 1: 13µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 15µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 88.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 40.2 mm, Length: 328.0 mm, Δ Collapse Pressure: 10 bar, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 13µ @ β200, Media Type: Synthetic, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 10 BAR, Seal: Nitrile

variants.title: Mann Filter HD 9003 Hydraulics | Replaces the Filtrec RHK201M10B
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter HD 9003 Hydraulics | Replaces the Filtrec RHK201M10B
variants.description: MANN-FILTER hydraulic filter elements for high-pressure filters offer maximum filtration performance and ensure trouble-free operation of the hydraulic system. Thanks to the filter medium, which is specially adapted to the intended use, the finest impurities are separated from the hydraulic fluid.
specifications: Style: Hydraulics, Dimension A: 88.0 mm, Dimension B: 40.0 mm, Dimension H: 328.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 13µ @ β200, Efficiency 2: 15µ @ β1000, Outer Diameter: 88.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 40.2 mm, Length: 328.0 mm, Media Type: Synthetic, Flow Direction: OUT-IN, Collapse Pressure: 10 BAR, Seal: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C

variants.title: Hydac 0201 RK 010 MM Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHK201M10B
variants.option1Value: Hydac 0201 RK 010 MM Return Filter | Replaces the Filtrec RHK201M10B
variants.description: Genuine Hydac 0201 RK 010 MM Return Filter. Built to HYDAC’s OEM specifications and quality standards, this genuine part offers reliable performance, long service life and a precise fit. It’s suitable for a wide range of hydraulic and process applications, helping protect equipment, reduce downtime and maintain system cleanliness. For best results, match the part code to your equipment manual and verify key dimensions and ratings (size, connection, filtration grade/flow) before installation.
